findings.message: Recursively copying entire context directories is security-sensitive. Copying '.' or '..' or top-level directories may include sensitive files (.git, .env, secrets, build artifacts). Instead, copy only specific files or directories needed. Use .dockerignore to exclude sensitive files, or copy specific subdirectories explicitly.
